seo.title: smyst.com | AI Twins, Digital Profiles and Twin Chat
seo.description: smyst.com is a free-only AI twin platform for public and private profiles, knowledge, memories and fast twin chats.
seo.keywords: AI twin, digital twin, knowledge profile, memories, smyst

start.emptyText: Choose a name above or start writing. The selected twin stays fixed in the top right.
start.freeOnlyNotice: Free-only MVP: GitHub Free, Cloudflare Free, IDrive e2. No paid AI or analytics services.

chat.replyMvp: For the free-only MVP I use a local simulated response logic without a paid AI service.
chat.replyNextStep: Next step: real twin data will come through Cloudflare Worker/KV and IDrive e2.
